note: Baron et al. 1988 states the Stephan 1981 vestibular volumes were measured from one side only (the reformat names the data columns with the _unilateral suffix)
Bauernfeind Table 1 is the LEFT insula; right hemisphere is the paper's Table 2 (now snapshotted as Bauernfeind_etal_2013_Table2)
Bauernfeind Table 2 is the RIGHT insula (the left is Table 1); combined to both-hemisphere insula in volumes_compiled.R
